cve_enrichment.description: Log4Shell — JNDI injection in log4j-core 2.14.1. generateComplianceReport logs user-supplied period param. LAZARUS-GROUP actively exploiting against financial platforms.
Spring4Shell — Spring Framework DataBinder RCE. Affects compliance-reports via spring-boot-starter-web 2.6.3. FIN7 exploiting against financial APIs.
Jackson Databind 2.13.0 resource exhaustion via deeply nested arrays. EPSS=0.082 — low exploitation probability. APT29 observed using variants.
.NET Core SignalR denial-of-service. Included to test CVE without matching library in this fixture — should not link to any library node.

threat_actors.name: Lazarus Group
threat_actors.description: North Korean state-sponsored APT targeting financial institutions and cryptocurrency platforms. Weaponised Log4Shell for initial access.

threat_actors.name: FIN7
threat_actors.description: Financially motivated cybercriminal group targeting payment processors and financial APIs. Actively exploits Spring4Shell.

threat_actors.name: APT29 (Cozy Bear)
threat_actors.description: Russian state-sponsored espionage group. Targets financial data for intelligence gathering. Activity_status=recent (not active).
